name: browser-use
description: Give Claude Code a hosted Browser Use cloud agent. Spins up a stealth cloud browser and runs long-horizon web tasks — browse, extract data, fill forms, log in, solve CAPTCHAs — with the browser-use-2.0 agent. No local Chrome and no CLI to install; runs entirely on Browser Use Cloud. Set BROWSER_USE_API_KEY (free key at cloud.browser-use.com).
